title: Using the Math Module
description: Import the 'math' module and use its 'sqrt' function to calculate the square root of 144. Print the result as a number (not a string).

code_requirements.fail_message: You must import the math module using 'import math'.

code_requirements.description: Uses math.sqrt() to calculate the square root
code_requirements.fail_message: Use math.sqrt() to calculate the square root of 144.

hints: Start with 'import math' at the top of your code
Call math.sqrt(144) to calculate the square root
Pass the result directly to print()
